question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link within 5 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

question: How do I update my email address?
answer: Log in, go to Account Settings, click 'Edit' next to your email, enter the new address and verify it. You'll receive a confirmation email to the new address.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To permanently delete your account, go to Account Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. This action is irreversible and all your data will be removed within 30 days.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication and toggle it on. You can use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or receive SMS codes.

question: My account is locked. What do I do?
answer: Accounts are locked after 5 failed login attempts. Wait 30 minutes and try again, or click 'Forgot Password' to reset your password and unlock your account immediately.

question: How do I change my username?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Profile > Edit Username. Usernames can be changed once every 30 days and must be unique.

question: Where is my order?
answer: You can track your order by logging in and going to Orders > Track. You'll also receive tracking emails. Standard orders ship within 2 business days.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placing them. Go to Orders > Your Order > Cancel. After 1 hour, the order may already be processing and cannot be cancelled.

question: Can I change my order after placing it?
answer: Order changes (size, color, quantity) can be made within 30 minutes of placing the order by contacting support. After that, the order is locked for processing.

question: I never received an order confirmation email.
answer: Check your spam folder first. If it's not there, log in and check Orders to confirm the order went through. You can also resend the confirmation from the Orders page.

question: How do I track my shipment?
answer: Once shipped, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. Click the link in the email or enter the tracking number on the carrier's website (UPS, FedEx, or USPS depending on your region).

question: Can I add items to an existing order?
answer: Unfortunately, items cannot be added to an existing order. You would need to place a new order. If placing within the same day, contact support to see if the orders can be combined.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping takes 2-3 business days. Overnight shipping is available for orders placed before 2 PM EST.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. International orders typically take 7-14 business days. Import duties and taxes are the customer's responsibility.

question: How do I qualify for free shipping?
answer: Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50 within the US. Use code FREESHIP at checkout for your first order regardless of order size.

question: How do I change my delivery address?
answer: Delivery address can be changed within 30 minutes of placing the order by contacting support. After that, the shipment cannot be redirected until it arrives at the original address.

question: My package is lost. What should I do?
answer: If tracking shows delivered but you haven't received it, first check with neighbors and your building's mail room. If still missing after 24 hours, contact us and we'll file a claim and send a replacement.

question: Can I pick up my order in store?
answer: Yes, in-store pickup is available at all our retail locations. Select 'Store Pickup' at checkout and choose your nearest store. You'll receive a ready-for-pickup notification within 2 hours.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase for unused items in original packaging. Sale items are final sale and cannot be returned. Start your return at Orders > Return Item.

question: How do I return an item?
answer: Go to Orders > Select Order > Return Item. Print the prepaid return label, pack the item securely, and drop it off at any UPS location. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receipt.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Once we receive your return, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. The amount appears on your original payment method within 3-5 additional business days depending on your bank.

question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
answer: Yes, exchanges are available for different sizes or colors of the same item. Go to Orders > Exchange Item. Exchanges ship free and are processed within 2 business days of receiving your return.

question: I received a damaged or defective product.
answer: We're sorry about that. Take a photo of the damage and contact us within 7 days of delivery. We'll send a replacement immediately and arrange free return pickup of the damaged item.

question: I received the wrong item.
answer: Sorry for the mix-up. Contact us within 7 days with your order number and a photo of the wrong item. We'll ship the correct item immediately with expedited shipping at no cost to you.

question: How do I update my payment method?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Payment Methods. Click 'Add Payment Method' to add a new card or 'Edit' to update an existing one. Changes apply to all future charges immediately.

question: How do I get an invoice for my order?
answer: Invoices are automatically emailed after each purchase. You can also download any invoice from Orders > Select Order > Download Invoice. Invoices include all tax and shipping details.

question: When is my subscription billed?
answer: Subscriptions are billed on the same day each month as your original sign-up date. You'll receive a reminder email 3 days before each billing date.

question: I was charged twice for the same order.
answer: Double charges are usually temporary authorizations that resolve within 24-48 hours. If both charges appear on your final statement, contact us immediately with your order number for an immediate refund.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription. You'll keep access until the end of your current billing period. You won't be charged again after cancellation.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We do not accept cash, checks, or wire transfers for online orders.
